queries: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ
وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا
What sura contains 'إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ'
"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"

إن الملائكة تنزل في هذه المساجد فإذا رأوا أحداً من أمتي قد صلى ركعتين قبل أن يجلس قالوا اللهم اغفر له اللهم ارحمه اللهم ارض عنه اللهم اقبل منه اللهم اكتب له الأجر اللهم ارفع درجته اللهم اجعل له خيراً مما ترك وخلفاً مما خلف
إن الملائكة تنزل في هذه المساجد
اللهم اغفر له اللهم ارحمه اللهم ارض عنه
اللهم اغفر له اللهم ارحمه اللهم ارض عنه

output.code: import json, os, glob, textwrap, sys, itertools
import glob, os, json, textwrap, sys, pathlib, subprocess, re
import os, glob, json, pprint, textwrap

hadith_text = "إن الملائكة تنزل في هذه المساجد، فإذا رأوا أحداً من أمتي قد صلى ركعتين قبل أن يجلس، قالوا: اللهم اغفر له، اللهم ارحمه، اللهم ارض عنه، اللهم اقبل منه، اللهم اكتب له الأجر، اللهم ارفع درجته، اللهم اجعل له خيراً مما ترك، وخلفاً مما خلف"
hadith_index = text.find(hadith_text)
hadith_index

verse_text = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
indices = []
start=0
while True:
    idx = text.find(verse_text, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
indices

trunc = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ"
text.find(trunc)

partial_text = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ"
partial_index = text.rfind(partial_text)
partial_index

citations = []

# Hadith
citations.append({
    "span_start": hadith_index,
    "span_end": hadith_end,
    "span_text": hadith_text,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Aya occurrences (10)
for idx in indices:
    span_start = idx
    span_end = idx + len(verse_text)
    citations.append({
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": verse_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": "ص",
            "sura_number": 38,
            "aya_number": 71
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ",
        "completely_invalid": False
    })

# Partial last
citations.append({
    "span_start": partial_index,
    "span_end": partial_end,
    "span_text": partial_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

len(citations)

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
